seo.title: Astro implementation checklist
seo.description: A practical checklist for shipping Astro projects safely.

content.intro: This checklist provides a technical verification path for Astro projects transitioning from development to a production environment, focusing on content integrity, performance optimization, and deployment stability.

items.title: Zod Schema Validation
items.description: Verify that all collections in src/content/config.ts have a defined schema and that 'npm run build' passes without validation errors.

items.title: Slug Uniqueness Check
items.description: Ensure no duplicate slugs exist across content collections to prevent build-time routing conflicts.

items.title: Frontmatter Type Alignment
items.description: Audit all .md and .mdx files to ensure frontmatter fields match the required Zod schema types exactly, specifically for dates and booleans.

items.title: Content Relationship Mapping
items.description: Use the reference() function in Zod schemas for related content (e.g., authors or categories) to ensure referential integrity.

items.title: Draft Content Filtering
items.description: Confirm that build scripts or collection queries explicitly filter out items where 'draft: true' is present in the frontmatter.

items.title: Client Directive Audit
items.description: Review all components for 'client:load', 'client:idle', or 'client:visible' and remove directives from components that do not require interactivity.

items.title: Component Tree Analysis
items.description: Ensure no server-side only data (like Node.js FS modules) is passed to hydrated client components to avoid bundling errors.

items.title: Framework Bundle Minimization
items.description: Verify that only one framework (e.g., React or Svelte) is used per page unless strictly necessary to minimize JS payload.

items.title: Client:Only Verification
items.description: Confirm that 'client:only' is only used for components that rely on browser-specific APIs and that a fallback loading state is provided.

items.title: Shared State Management
items.description: Validate that shared state between islands is handled via Nano Stores or custom events rather than a heavy global provider if possible.

items.title: Astro Image Component Usage
items.description: Replace all standard tags with the component from 'astro:assets' for automatic WebP conversion and resizing.

items.title: Remote Image Patterns
items.description: Configure 'image.remotePatterns' in astro.config.mjs to authorize external domains used for dynamic images or pSEO content.

items.title: LCP Optimization
items.description: Apply 'loading="eager"' and 'fetchpriority="high"' to images appearing in the initial viewport to improve Largest Contentful Paint.

items.title: Explicit Dimensions
items.description: Define width and height attributes for all images to prevent Layout Shift (CLS) during page load.

items.title: SVG Optimization
items.description: Pass SVGs through an optimizer like SVGO or use a dedicated Astro icon integration to remove unnecessary metadata.

items.title: Site Configuration
items.description: Define the 'site' property in astro.config.mjs with the final production URL to enable correct absolute URL generation for sitemaps.

items.title: Sitemap Integration
items.description: Install and configure '@astrojs/sitemap' and verify that the sitemap.xml is generated in the /dist folder after build.

items.title: Canonical URL Implementation
items.description: Ensure every page includes a <link rel="canonical"> tag generated using Astro.url to prevent duplicate content issues.

items.title: OpenGraph and Meta Tags
items.description: Verify that dynamic meta tags (title, description, og:image) are correctly populated from content collection frontmatter.

items.title: Robots.txt Setup
items.description: Add a robots.txt file to the public/ directory that correctly points to the sitemap and defines crawl rules.

items.title: Adapter Configuration
items.description: Install the correct SSR adapter (e.g., @astrojs/cloudflare, @astrojs/vercel) if using Hybrid or SSR mode.

items.title: Environment Variable Validation
items.description: Define all production secrets in the hosting provider's dashboard and verify they are accessed via import.meta.env.

items.title: 404 Page Customization
items.description: Create a src/pages/404.astro file to ensure custom branding for broken links and verify it renders correctly in the build output.

items.title: Build Cache Verification
items.description: Confirm that the CI/CD pipeline is configured to cache the .astro directory to speed up subsequent builds.

items.title: Header and Redirect Rules
items.description: Configure _headers or _redirects files in the public/ folder if required by your specific hosting provider (e.g., Cloudflare Pages).
